ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mobility_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of geographic aggregation (e.g., County, State) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code for the state */,
  "state_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code for the state */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population_staying_at_home" INTEGER /* Number of people staying at home */,
  "population_not_staying_at_home" INTEGER /* Number of people not staying at home */,
  "number_of_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips */,
  "number_of_trips_1" INTEGER /* Number of trips less than 1 mile */,
  "number_of_trips_1_3" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 1 and 3 miles */,
  "number_of_trips_3_5" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 3 and 5 miles */,
  "number_of_trips_5_10" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 5 and 10 miles */,
  "number_of_trips_10_25" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 10 and 25 miles */,
  "number_of_trips_25_50" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 25 and 50 miles */,
  "number_of_trips_50_100" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 50 and 100 miles */,
  "number_of_trips_100_250" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 100 and 250 miles */,
  "number_of_trips_250_500" INTEGER /* Number of trips between 250 and 500 miles */,
  "number_of_trips_500_plus" INTEGER /* Number of trips greater than or equal to 500 miles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used to collect the mobility data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., online survey, physical sensor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_data_state_fips FOREIGN KEY ("state_fips") REFERENCES states ("state_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_data_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES levels ("level_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_data_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("county_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "state_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* Seat of the county */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic level (e.g., County, State) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the trip category (e.g., <1 mile, 1-3 miles) */,
  "min_distance" REAL /* Minimum distance of the category in miles */,
  "max_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance of the category in miles */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the trip category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobility_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the summary */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the county */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips */,
  "avg_trip_length" REAL /* Average length of trips in miles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_summary_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., survey, sensor) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., online survey, physical sensor) */,
  "collection_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "check_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality check */,
  "check_result_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality check result */,
  "check_performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "anomaly_date" TEXT /* Date when the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly (e.g., outlier, missing data) */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_anomalies_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_corrections" (
  "correction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "correction_date" TEXT /* Date when the correction was made */,
  "correction_type" TEXT /* Type of the correction (e.g., data imputation, data removal) */,
  "correction_description" TEXT /* Description of the correction */,
  "correction_performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the correction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_corrections_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versioning_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "population_staying_at_home" INTEGER /* Predicted number of people staying at home */,
  "population_not_staying_at_home" INTEGER /* Predicted number of people not staying at home */,
  "number_of_trips" INTEGER /* Predicted total number of trips */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the prediction */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_predictions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., linear regression, neural network) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "model_run_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was run */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model's prediction */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES data_predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES data_models ("model_id")
)
